summary: ARI Push Engine V2 - All 4 new features tested. Backend: 17/17 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Dashboard loads with all new elements (Test Harness tab, drift mode badge, provider health, queue stats). Fixed minor UI bug where drift mode badge wasn't showing mode name after toggle.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Drift mode badge not showing mode name after toggle - was using data.current_mode but state expected data.mode

critical_code_review_comments: repositories.py: compute_outbound_delta_hash correctly takes 7 params (provider, property_id, room_type_code, rate_plan_code, date_from, date_to, payload) - Returns 16-char hex hash
provider_test_harness.py: Well-structured test runners for HotelRunner (9 steps) and Exely (6 steps) with DRY-RUN fallbacks
ari_drift_worker.py: Clean dual-mode implementation (normal: 120s/changed, recovery: 30s/full) with mode toggle API
repositories.py: get_operational_metrics properly returns provider_health, performance (latency percentiles), and queue stats
ARIPushDashboard.jsx: All new UI elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration_62. TEST_ prefixed room_type_codes (TEST_STD, TEST_DLX, TEST_DRYRUN, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARI Push Engine V2 fully tested. All 4 new features working: (1) Delta hash with 7 fields - change sets have provider_delta_hash field with 16-char hex hash, (2) Test harness - HotelRunner 9 steps, Exely 6 steps - both run in DRY-RUN mode, (3) Drift mode - normal (120s/changed) and recovery (30s/full) - toggle via badge click or API, (4) Operational metrics - provider_health, performance (p50/p95/p99 latency), queue stats. Frontend dashboard at /ari-push has Test Harness tab (5th tab). Drift mode badge is clickable to toggle modes.
mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: HotelRunner and Exely adapters in DRY-RUN mode. Test harness also runs DRY-RUN tests. No real provider credentials configured.

backend_api_tests: TestProviderTestHarnessChecklist: hotelrunner_checklist_returns_9_steps, exely_checklist_returns_6_steps, unknown_provider_returns_404 - ALL PASSED
TestProviderTestHarnessRun: run_hotelrunner_all_tests, run_exely_all_tests, run_unknown_provider_returns_404, test_result_structure - ALL PASSED
TestDriftWorkerMode: get_drift_mode_returns_current_mode, switch_to_recovery_mode, switch_to_normal_mode, invalid_mode_returns_400 - ALL PASSED
TestOperationalMetrics: metrics_endpoint_accessible, queue_stats_structure, provider_health_has_rates - ALL PASSED

Engine status bar with Buffer, Adapters, Drift mode - FOUND
Drift mode badge with data-testid='drift-mode-badge' - FOUND AND CLICKABLE
Drift badge toggle - WORKING (clicks toggle between modes)
Provider health cards showing ACK/Error/Retry rates - FOUND
Queue stats card showing Queue Depth/Retry Backlog/Dead Letters - FOUND
5 Tabs (Queue Monitor, Outbound Logs, Drift, Events, Test Harness) - ALL FOUND
Test Harness tab shows HotelRunner and Exely validation cards - FOUND
Run All button for HotelRunner - CLICKABLE, runs 9 tests, shows results
Run All button for Exely - VISIBLE
Test results show step name, success checkmark, duration_ms - CORRECT
